SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SCOTT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, MARY KATHERINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
